title: Kilrock Plughole Unblocker Bathroom 500ml 2 Pack - Fast-Acting Drain Unblocker for Showers, Baths & Sinks – Removes Hair, Sludge & Soap Scum – Clears Blockages & Restores Fast Flow
features: BLASTS THROUGH TOUGH BLOCKAGES FAST: Kilrock’s Extra Strong Bathroom Plughole Unblocker powers through hair, soap scum, and bathroom residue to clear slow-draining sinks, baths and showers quickly and effectively.

HEAVY-DUTY FORMULA FOR BATHROOM BUILD-UP: Specially formulated to target typical bathroom blockages, this thick liquid cuts through stubborn deposits that ordinary cleaners leave behind—restoring free-flowing drains.

EASY TO USE – NO PLUNGER REQUIRED: Simply pour the full 500ml bottle directly into the plughole, leave to work until the blockage is freed, then flush through with hot water. Zero fuss, zero tools, maximum impact.
CLEANS & FRESHENS WHILE IT UNBLOCKS: As it clears the blockage, the powerful formula also cleans and freshens the plughole, helping eliminate lingering odours caused by grime and trapped debris.

THE TRUSTED CHOICE FOR BATHROOM DRAINS: Ideal for regular home maintenance or emergency unblocking. Suitable for sinks, baths, and shower plugholes—keeping your bathroom flowing smoothly and smelling clean.
description: Directions Pour the drain opener substance into the affected drain, leave for a recommended time to allow the product to dissolve the blockage, then flush with water Safety Warning General drain cleaner safety warning: Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If ingested, seek medical help immediately.
